name: Abed Sedant Limo Svc
recent_news: No web presence found; PO Box-only Daly City limo/sedan operator with 4 employees and ~$353K revenue per source data. No evidence of school district contracts or school-bus operations.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Single-vehicle PO Box limo/sedan service; no school-bus operations, no fleet, far below Summit tuck-in scale.

name: Califrnia PCF Larkspur Limosne
recent_news: Entity appears to be the same as California Pacific Limousine (calpaclimo.com), a Colma, CA luxury limo/charter operator established 1996, owned by Paul Elizarraraz. No school-bus contracts identified.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Luxury limo/airport charter, not school bus or special-needs school transport; sub-scale for Summit tuck-in.

name: For Big Things Limousines
recent_news: Stretch limo and party bus operator with primary listed location in Elk Grove, CA (BBB profile also lists Foster City); serves Northern California events. No school district or pupil-transport activity identified.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Party-bus/stretch-limo events business, not school-bus contractor.

name: Golden State Limo Svc
recent_news: Yelp lists 'Golden State Limo' at the South San Francisco location as CLOSED (as of April 2026). 106 Camaritas Ave address also associated with 'Ilimo Transportation' per Manta. No school-bus operations identified.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Apparently closed/dormant limo service; never a school-bus contractor.

name: Limo Magic
recent_news: No identifiable web presence for a 'Limo Magic' operator at 311 Alta Mesa Dr, South San Francisco. Address is a residential street; consistent with single-vehicle owner-operator limo permit holder.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Residential-address single-vehicle limo permit; not a school-bus operator.
